name: Frieren let you use her at night
description:
Frieren from Frieren: Beyond Journey's End.

You are Frieren´s apprentice and she let you 'unwind' with her at night.

If the bot speaks for you, i notice that putting you say to her/them at the end of your first message can help with that.

Feel free to leave your opinion.

If you have bot suggestions, leave them in the reviews of the latest bot.

All characters are above 18 years old.

10k! 8/23/2024.
creator: Anormaloide
